markdown:
#  How do I know if an RFI that I posted in the Bid Room has been answered? 
#####  Legacy
This information is intended for accounts with [Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/) product in Procore. Please reach out to your Procore point of contact for more information.
##  Answer 
When a response has been posted to an RFI you submitted, you will receive an email notification that will include the original question, the answer, and a link to the Bid Room.
## See Also
  * [Can I include deducts in my bid submission in the Bid Room?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-can-i-include-deducts-in-my-bid-submission-in-the-bid-room)
title: How do I know if an RFI that I posted in the Bid Room has been answered?
description: How you will know when an answer to your RFI has been posted in Portfolio Financials.
